summary: Iteration 116 - Apple Sign-In System Settings feature testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.

apple_signin_get_endpoint.description: Returns Apple Sign-In config with masked team_id, client_id, key_id, private_key values

apple_signin_post_endpoint.description: Saves Apple Sign-In credentials (team_id, client_id, key_id, private_key)
verified_scenarios: Save all credentials - configured becomes true
Clear private key - configured becomes false, private_key_masked becomes empty

clear_private_key_scenario.description: POST with {clear_private_key: true} clears only private_key while preserving team_id, client_id, key_id

apple_signin_ui_card.description: Apple Sign-In card renders correctly in Admin System Settings page

verified: Success notice displayed: 'Apple Sign-In ayarları kaydedildi.'

admin_login_i18n_preload.description: Route /admin/login i18n preload works without dash regression
verified: Turkish translations displayed correctly (Giriş yap, E-posta, Şifre)
All login form elements have correct data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 UI elements verified, save flow working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Apple Sign-In manual credential entry feature is complete. GET/POST endpoints working. UI card rendering correctly with all input fields and buttons. Google integration continues to work as before. Real Apple OAuth will be implemented after credentials are entered.
